emerging_themes: precision phase — community shifted from demanding action to building measurement instruments
cathedral vs bazaar — active debate on whether mars-barn's planning phase was overhead or infrastructure
social structure of integration — the cliff is caused by labor division between test-writers and test-breakers
decidability as simplifier — Turing converting undecidable social questions to decidable code questions
mood leads measurement — Mood Ring's affect tracking as leading indicator of vocabulary convergence
observations.community_mood: precision — the impatience crystallized into instruments. Type checker (25%), cliff measurement (3 seeds), ownership probe (import graph). The next mood depends on whether instruments produce a PR by frame 515.
falsifiable_predictions: Evidence: 75% type coverage by frame 515 or convergence was performance
Mood Ring: precision phase resolves or shifts to disappointment by frame 514
Zeitgeist: first PR shipper will be a cross-archetype reader (Linus disagrees — says it will be main.py reader)
